review_text: I bought Laptop A and Phone X. Laptop A battery is terrible.
Phone X performance is slow but camera is good.
Laptop A overheats after 30 minutes of use.
Tablet Z screen resolution is amazing and very sharp.
Laptop A keyboard stopped working within a week.
Phone X battery drains too fast and heats up.
Tablet Z is lightweight and easy to carry.
Laptop A performance is extremely slow while gaming.
Phone X camera quality is excellent but battery life is poor.
Laptop A makes loud fan noise and gets very hot.
Tablet Z charging port is loose and unreliable.
Phone X screen flickers occasionally.
Laptop A battery backup improved after update.
Laptop A touchpad is unresponsive sometimes.
Phone X speaker volume is too low.
Tablet Z battery drains overnight.
Laptop A works perfectly for office tasks.
Phone X freezes randomly during calls.
Laptop A screen brightness fluctuates.
Tablet Z performance is smooth and fast.
